title: The Rooftop Battle Turns Desperate
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Momonosuke, Unknown person #2, Yamato, Kaido, Unknown person #3 as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I still do not have the whole picture.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Incredible, monosuke-kun!! You really can speak to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just like open predicted, you're the one that's meant to lead the world to its dawn!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I learned why I cannot die here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What made Father and Roger laugh at the final island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The true importance of this task still eludes me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like Father was an all-seeing prophet!! if he was still alive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would he still want to open wano under these circumstances?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not as wise as he was!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think of the potential dangers to the people of Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it makes me want to keep the borders shut!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Does that make me a coward, Yamato?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... in this era even shinobi are free to choose... FukurokuJU!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! You're one of the Samura!! Why are you still here?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: You... are one of Luffy- Dono's...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
